name: Goblin Decoy Squad
name_jp: ゴブリン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>陽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>部</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>隊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, you can draw 1 card. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase. This card's battle position cannot be changed until the end of your next turn, except with a card effect.
mnst_eff: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, you can draw 1 card. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase. This card's battle position cannot be changed until the end of your next turn, except with a card effect.
eff: When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, you can draw 1 card. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase. This card's battle position cannot be changed until the end of your next turn, except with a card effect.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
